options.name: -p
options.description: Connect to this port on the remote host

options.name: -l
options.description: Log in using this user name

options.name: -L
options.description: Forward a local port to the remote side

options.name: -R
options.description: Forward a remote port to the local side

options.name: -D
options.description: Set up a local dynamic SOCKS proxy

options.name: -N
options.description: Do not run a remote command; just forward ports

options.name: -f
options.description: Go to background just before command execution

options.name: -v
options.description: Increase verbosity; repeat for more detail

args.name: command
args.description: Command to run on the remote host
